text.title: modern-ba-framework Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for modern-ba-framework as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using the modern BA framework as a deliverable producer rather than a router.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The framework's output is ba-approach.json — a routing decision. Producing "a BA report from the modern framework" creates a document nobody asked for and skips the actual methodology execution.

failure-mode.description: KA included in ba-approach.json without a named executable sibling methodology.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: A KA without a methodology is theatre; the planner must map every INCLUDE'd KA to at least one sibling methodology folder that the executor can load and run.

failure-mode.description: Auto-execution from planner to executor without human sign-off on the BA approach.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Perspective bias introduced in the planner (e.g., defaulting to Agile for a BPM initiative) propagates through the entire pipeline and produces misaligned artifacts that cannot be corrected without starting over.

failure-mode.description: Cost-driven downgrade of model_routing at runtime (opus → sonnet for gap analysis).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The savings are marginal compared to the rework cost when gap analysis quality degrades. Lock model selection in the JSON and reject runtime overrides.

failure-mode.description: Persisting competency-gap.md with individual names attached to gap scores.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The artifact contains performance-grade signals about specific people; storing it outside a private repo without scrubbing creates HR and GDPR exposure.
